commentary_text: The model favors Switzerland to win at 77%, while sportsbooks compress that to 59%—a 17 percentage-point gap. The market simultaneously raises Bosnia and Herzegovina from 4% to 17%, suggesting real-money flows are pricing in material uncertainty the model's Elo-based forecast does not capture. This hedging could reflect recent lineup changes, injury news, or form shifts unavailable to the model since its last update. The dashboard flags this divergence as a signal worth monitoring; it does not resolve whether the market's caution or the model's confidence is better calibrated.
